# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
name: webappchart
description: A Helm chart for Kubernetes based on my app  # provide a short description of what this is (could be your project name) to make it easy to understand the purpose or use case.  
type: application   
version: '0.2'    
appVersion: "1"     
keywords: ["my", "web"]       
home: http://githubrepoURL       # provide a URL where people can learn more about this chart if they have Git repo and want to know the main component it provides  (ex githubRepo).    Example of `http`s source code is not possible as there're no actual sources available.    
maintainers:      # Provide your maintainer(s) information   with their email address when ready for live usage and more details about each member if they are willing to be part in that community or project (name, url).  This field will require an array of these elements where every element has name & optional URL. Example: `maintainers: - name="John Doe",url=https://www.example-org/john`
